name: skylence-plugins
description: Skyline binary plugins for Claude Code: MCP daemon wiring, PreToolUse enforcement, and daemon watchdog monitor.

plugins.name: skyline-claude
plugins.description: Wires the skyline MCP daemon into Claude Code: HTTP MCP server, PreToolUse enforcement redirecting Read/Edit/Write/Grep/Glob/Bash to skyline equivalents, and a daemon watchdog monitor that alerts Claude when the daemon goes down.

plugins.name: skybox-claude
plugins.description: Wires the skybox code-knowledge-graph MCP daemon into Claude Code (HTTP MCP on port 7070): query/context/impact/route_map plus the indexing tools for cross-repo code navigation, execution-flow tracing, and change-impact analysis. Read-only — complements native file tools, does not replace them.

plugins.name: skyway-claude
plugins.description: Wires the skyway workflow-orchestration MCP daemon into Claude Code (HTTP MCP on port 3090): run/step inspection, job control, workflow lint + source, cost estimation, and approval/waiter tools for authoring and operating .sky workflows. Additive — complements native tools, does not replace them.
